title: Action
description: A governed action moving through the GAIL OS mandatory 12-stage state machine. GAIL OS canonical source. Transport-neutral.

AuthorityLevel.description: R0–R5 authority ladder — classifies how much external effect an action may have. R5 is human-only.

MissionStatus.description: 12-stage action lifecycle. Must match mission.schema.json MissionStatus.

action_id.description: Unique action identifier. Must use the 'action-' prefix.

cns_trace_id.description: Shared CNS trace thread. Must not encode tenant, customer, file, secret, or provider identifiers.

mission_id.description: Parent mission identifier. Must use the 'mission-' prefix.

actor.description: Human or system actor performing this action.

status.description: Current stage in the mandatory action state machine.

authority_level.description: R-level classification. R5 is human-only and cannot enter agent execution states.

risk_tier.description: Risk tier classification. 0 = no risk, 5 = highest risk. R4 requires an AuthorityEnvelope.

arguments.description: Action-specific argument payload. Must not contain secrets.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this action was created.

claimed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this action was claimed for execution.

executed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this action was executed or stopped.

envelope_id.description: AuthorityEnvelope reference. Required for R4 actions. Must use the 'env-' prefix.
